home.heroH1: Properties for Sale in Cancún and the Riviera Maya — Tresor Real Estate
home.heroSubtitle: Real estate developments in Cancún and the Riviera Maya
home.positioningTitleMuted: We develop, we manage, we sell,
home.positioningDesc: We offer end-to-end solutions — from development planning and marketing to buying and selling property — with expert advice, tailored strategies, and a level of service that delivers results.
home.serviceDevelopDesc: We create meaningful places that leave a lasting mark on the cities we build in.
home.serviceManageDesc: We guide you from financial planning through to commercial execution.
home.serviceSalesPartnerDesc: We become your sales team to secure your real estate success.

plaza.projectTitle: Much more than a commercial unit.
plaza.projectBody1: is located in a high-density residential area with validated vehicular and pedestrian traffic. The double-height architectural design, facades with integrated greenery and carefully curated tenant mix create a retail ecosystem that boosts the profitability of each business.
plaza.projectBody2: Every unit comes with electrical, plumbing and sanitary installations ready for your use. Ample parking, pedestrian access and common areas designed to increase dwell time.
plaza.bullet2: Vehicular traffic validated by market study
plaza.fpDesc: Architectural floor plans for the available unit types. All include hydro-sanitary, electrical and air conditioning installations.
plaza.masterPlanDesc: Select a unit to view its spec sheet and request a quote. Availability updates live.
plaza.selectUnitHint: Click any pin on the master plan to see details and quote.
plaza.soldMsg: This unit has already been sold. There are similar options available!
plaza.reservedMsg: This unit is reserved and in process. We will notify you if it becomes available.
plaza.blockedMsg: This unit is not available to the public at this time.
plaza.apartaDesc: Secure payment via Stripe (card · OXXO · SPEI). Legal advice included. Quote, download the PDF and reserve in one session.
plaza.agendaDesc: Choose a date, time and format. We'll confirm within 24 hours.
plaza.reservaDesc: Leave us your details and an advisor will reach out with all the information.

quote.title: Quote your unit
quote.detailsDesc: So we can send you the quote and provide personalised follow-up.
quote.paymentPlanDesc: Choose the scheme that best fits your cash flow. Automatic discounts for early payment.
quote.summaryDesc: Review the details. We will send the PDF to {email} once you generate the quote.
quote.selectUnitToStart: Select a unit to get started.
quote.notes: What do you plan to do in the unit? (optional)
quote.isBroker: I am a broker or real estate advisor
quote.quoteNote: Quote valid for 7 days. The $50,000 MXN reserve is refundable.
quote.errorMsg: There was an error generating your quote. Please try again.

thanks.title: Quote ready
thanks.subtitle: Your proposal is valid for 7 days. We sent a copy to your inbox.
thanks.reserveDesc: Refundable. Legal advice included. Secure payment via Stripe.

rivieraCta.titleHighlight: the heart of the Mexican Caribbean
rivieraCta.desc: Mexico's fastest-growing destination: sustained appreciation, dollar-denominated rental income, and year-round quality of life. Invest today where the Caribbean works for you and secure your place in the region's highest-potential developments.

exitIntent.desc: Schedule a no-obligation visit and an advisor will show you available units, prices, and payment plans in person.
exitIntent.footnote: No obligation · Response in under 2 hrs

commercialModal.title: Sign in to continue
commercialModal.descAsesor: Exclusive material for the Tresor sales team.
commercialModal.descBroker: Sign in to view the sales materials for our developments.
commercialModal.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up

broker.gateDesc: Leave your details to enter the Quattro Sales Drive.

footer.claim: We build spaces that help businesses grow.
footer.brokerDesc: Presentations, prices, master plans, admin forms and marketing materials in one place.
footer.rights: © 2026 Tresor Real Estate · All rights reserved
footer.disclaimer: The information, prices, and conditions published on this site are for informational purposes only and are subject to change without notice. Images, renderings, floor plans, and areas are illustrative representations for promotional purposes and do not constitute an exact representation of the final product nor create any contractual obligation. Developments in which Tresor Real Estate participates as Sales Partner are the property and responsibility of their respective developers; Tresor acts exclusively as a marketing agent and assumes no responsibility for the design, construction, delivery, or fulfillment of such projects. Every purchase is subject to the terms and conditions set forth in the corresponding contract.

agenda.title: Schedule your visit
agenda.desc: Tell us what you're looking for and let's book your appointment — in office or by video call, an advisor will walk you through the available options.
agenda.formIntro: Complete the form below to book your visit and take the first step toward your next investment.
agenda.interestLocalDesc: To invest or your own business
agenda.presencialDesc: At the development site. We'll show you the available options live.
agenda.zoomDesc: From anywhere. Virtual tour + live commercial presentation.
agenda.timePickDateFirst: Pick a date first to see available times.
agenda.timeNoSlots: No available times that day — pick another date.
agenda.submitNote: Your information is fully protected. Your visit is booked instantly — see you soon.
agenda.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again.
agenda.thankDesc: Save the date. We'll take care of the rest.
agenda.calendarDesc: Save the reminder so you don't miss it. We'll also send a confirmation email.
agenda.whatsappDesc: Have questions before the visit? Our team replies instantly.
agenda.step01d: An advisor will contact you within 2 hours to confirm your appointment and send you the details.
agenda.step02dPresencial: We'll be waiting at the development. A dedicated advisor will walk you through all available options.
agenda.step02dZoom: You'll receive the Zoom link in advance. Virtual tour + live commercial presentation.
agenda.step03d: After the visit we'll hand you full commercial information: prices, floor plans and payment plan.
agenda.officeDesc: We're at Plaza Espacio, inside Puerto Cancún — steps from the marina, in the heart of the Hotel Zone.

reserva.apartaDesc: Secure your spot with a reservation. 100% secure payment with bank-grade encryption via Stripe; you get your receipt instantly.
reserva.submitNote: Payment protected with bank-grade encryption via Stripe. Refundable per contract.
reserva.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again.
reserva.graciasDesc: We received your reservation payment. An advisor will reach out with the next steps.
reserva.graciasNextDesc: An advisor will contact you within 2 hours with your reservation contract and full payment plan.
reserva.graciasWhatsappDesc: Questions about your reservation? Our team replies instantly.
reserva.apartaIntro: Quickly reserve with <bold>{amount}</bold> and secure your unit at {devName}. <yellow>100% Refundable.</yellow>

chatbot.title: Tresor Advisor
chatbot.subtitle: Online to help you
